name: pb-hcf
description: Consolidates HCF flow customisation for the ProxiBlue fleet: multi-playbook wire installer (gitnexus, graphiti, security, …), bundled agents (gitnexus-reviewer, security-quorum + 3 specialists), and opt-in HCF v2 hook enrollment via agent frontmatter. Replaces pb-gitnexus. HCF source stays untouched — pb-hcf works via context wiring (.claude/CLAUDE.md fenced section + .claude/<playbook>.md files) and project-local .claude/agents/ overrides stamped with phase/order/mode when --enable is passed to /pb-hcf:wire.
